name: labor_policy_municipal_bond_covenant_kestrel_jus_mer
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Labor Policy, the situation tagged internally around labor policy municipal bond covenant kestrel jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Zara Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Labor Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Dubois
agents.identity: I am Camila Dubois, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Labor Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so mercy does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so justice does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Zara Ishikawa must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Zara Ishikawa do?
